summary: Reviewed the GAP-020 branch diff against main via the pushed HEAD commit 57db3869dd10115fc6681038c064694631a0ddd7 because local git/python execution was blocked by the read-only sandbox. No blocking correctness or contract issues found.
contract_items_verified: GAP-020 DoD: new tests/test_pipeline_s3_readback.py is marked unit and uses injected fsspec memory://; no Docker/MinIO/network required.
GAP-020 DoD: s3 _list_bronze_files glob/filter path is covered, including .meta.json sidecar exclusion.
GAP-020 DoD: no-backend ValueError is covered with match='bronze_root or s3'.
GAP-020 DoD: _read_tsv s3 path is covered for gzip-over-s3 and local/s3 DataFrame parity.
GAP-020 DoD: _read_text/_read_bronze_news local/s3 parity is covered, including UTF-8 payload with non-ASCII characters through a locale-sensitive fake text backend.
GAP-014 coupled fix: pipeline._read_text now opens non-Path objects in rb mode and decodes utf-8 explicitly; Path branch unchanged.
Tests/evidence: committed progress/register evidence records focused unit, all unit, full pytest, and compileall passing; I could not independently rerun tests in this sandbox.

Hard Rules: no Bronze landing/write logic changed; committed fixtures are read-only references; numeric stats are read byte/value-identically with pandas; no LLM or numeric rewriting introduced; no runtime outputs added outside output/.
Dashboard sync: docs/TASKS.md and docs/index.html were updated along with docs/GAP_REGISTER.md and docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md for the GAP-020/GAP-014 state change.
Coursework workflow: research note added at .planning/coursework/research/bigdata/gap-020-s3-readback-tests-2026-06-24.md and .planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md updated.
